---
name: Security lab request
about: Propose a new defensive security lab
title: ""
labels: lab

---

## Threat model

Describe the infrastructure risk this lab would simulate.

## Defensive value

Explain what engineers would learn and how hardened mode would help.

## Safety constraints

Confirm the lab would use synthetic data, local-only targets, and no real exploits.

## Local-only validation

Describe how the lab could be validated with `make test` and `make validate`.

## Suggested metrics and alerts

Optional Prometheus metric names or alert ideas.
